task.title: Configure production monitoring and alerting
task.description: Setup comprehensive monitoring, alerting, and log aggregation for production

implementation.details: Configure Prometheus alerting rules, setup Grafana dashboards, implement log aggregation, create SLA monitoring, and setup incident response.

options.option: 7 days local, archive to object storage

task.acceptance_criteria: Monitoring captures all critical metrics, alerts fire correctly, logs are searchable and retained, SLA dashboards show accurate data
